sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63754" key="logoklopi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λογο-κλοπία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n63754.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stealing of another's words</tr_> or thoughts, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">plagiarism</tr_>, attributed to Empedocles by <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1733.tlg001:81" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Timae.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">81</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
